summary: Replaced Number(new Date()) with Date.now() on common.js:75. Primary 117.86 -> 106.40 ms (-11.46 ms, 9.7% faster). Guard 25.90 -> 26.12 ms (+0.22 ms, within 3 ms tolerance). Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint warnings only.

Wrapped format regex in indexOf('%') check on common.js:91. Skips regex replacement entirely when args[0] has no format specifiers (~50% of bench calls). Primary 117.86 -> 104.62 ms (-13.24 ms, 11.2%). Guard 25.90 -> 24.72 ms (slight improvement). Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint warnings only.
Added indexOf newline short-circuit in formatArgs (node.js:175). Primary 286.61 -> 252.94 ms (-33.67 ms, 11.7%). Guard 56.97 -> 54.53 ms. Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint clean.

Cache ANSI colorCode and colorPrefix in init() so formatArgs reuses them instead of recomputing every call. Primary 291.21 -> 264.20 ms (-27.01 ms, 9.3%). Guard 54.67 -> 54.87 ms (stable). Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint clean.

Replaced formatters.o split/map/join with regex /\\n\\s*/g replace. Correctness preserved (fingerprints match, 16 tests pass, lint clean). Primary 277.69 -> 274.86 ms (-2.83 ms) — below 3 ms threshold. As predicted, bench exercises %O (formatters.O), not %o.

Replaced args.splice O(n) mutation in format-string callback with a fresh newArgs array built in one pass (common.js:90). Primary 275.95 -> 264.43 ms (-11.52 ms, 4.2%). Guard stable. Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint clean.

Cached last diff/humanized pair on debug instance in formatArgs (node.js:176). Skips ms.humanize() when diff unchanged. 5-run medians: primary 292.28 -> 265.02 ms (-27.26 ms, 9.3%). Guard 55.51 -> 57.33 ms (+1.82, within 3 ms tolerance). Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint clean.

Replaced self.prev/self.curr per-call writes with Object.defineProperty getters backed by closure vars. 5-run medians: primary 286.23 -> 276.74 ms (-9.49 ms, 3.3%). Guard stable. Fingerprints match. 16 tests pass, lint clean.
